menstrual.ingredients: spinach, lentils, kidney beans, beef, broccoli, pumpkin seeds
menstrual.insight: Your body needs iron and Vitamin C right now. Focus on iron-dense whole foods and bright vegetables to restore energy.
menstrual.label: Menstrual Phase

follicular.insight: Rising estrogen calls for gut-friendly probiotics and healthy fats to fuel your growing energy and lift your mood.
follicular.label: Follicular Phase

ovulatory.insight: Support ovulation with fibre-rich and anti-inflammatory foods that reduce bloating and keep inflammation low.
ovulatory.label: Ovulatory Phase

luteal.insight: Magnesium-rich foods ease PMS symptoms while complex carbohydrates stabilise mood and sustain your energy levels.
luteal.label: Luteal Phase
